title: Nether's Delight crops 3D
body:
**Merged with** [REVIVED Farmer's Delight crops 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/revived-farmers-delight-crops-3d)**. Updates will no longer released here.**

Also available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/nethers-delight-crops-3d)

This texture pack makes Nether's Delight crops 3D.

As the name suggests, **[Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight)** is required to work.

- Supported 3D models

Crimson Fungus Colony, Warped Fungus Colony, Propelplant Cane, Propelplant Torch.


 
- Supported emissive textures (**This feature requires Optifine.**)

Crimson Fungus Colony, Warped Fungus Colony, Propelplant Cane, Propelplant Torch, mimicarnation, Soul Compost, Rich Soul Soil.

Enjoy :D

Suggest & Report is available on [forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdFSqP5WUo07i1xXMQdTnhz9ENo6pHzrN-FkhjKqgpSA5KoLQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) and [Discord](https://discord.gg/uTDu7K3Ezn)
